source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Compact English operations UI with stable tabular numbers, short work-order labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese task, material, schedule, and maintenance screens.
layout: Dense 8px operations grids, bark-toned navigation rails, work-order cards, material inventory tables, stream-flow charts, dam-stick dividers, tail-scale texture samples, and restrained 8px cards.

prompts.label: Transparent beaver motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Beaver transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a beaver motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete mammal subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A realistic North American beaver in a compact woodland-stream pose, seated in three-quarter view with warm brown fur, rounded ears, dark alert eyes, pale tan muzzle, small orange-brown incisors visible but friendly, strong front paws holding a short clean-cut stick, and a broad flat textured beaver tail visible to one side. Fur should show layered brown guard hairs and softer tan highlights; tail should show leathery scale texture in bark-brown tones. The identity must read clearly as beaver, not otter, muskrat, groundhog, capybara, or squirrel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full head, body, paws, stick, and full tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves fur and tail texture. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no dam scene, no water surface, no landscape, no log pile, no second animal, no human props, no text, no watermark, no cartoon style, no mascot costume.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beaver light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Beaver", derived from the visible isolated beaver motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible constructive operations system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, constructive operations and field planning mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beaver, Beaver Tail, Woodland Stream, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Operations Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from warm brown beaver fur, tan muzzle highlights, bark-brown stick and tail scales, dark wet-fur shadows, pale wood chips, woodland stream blue, reed green, and dam-building geometry. The board must read as beaver and constructive operations, not otter, squirrel, generic camping, lumberjack branding, or blue corporate SaaS.
Typography: English operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual labels for tasks, materials, water flow, crew schedules, asset maintenance, and construction logs with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, project tiles, work-order cards, material inventory count cards, schedule summary, table rows, task list, command search palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: constructive operations system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, pale riverbank paper surfaces, bark-brown structure, beaver-fur primary actions, tail-scale texture panels, stream-blue focus and chart highlights, reed-green success, wood-chip tan badges, thin dam-stick dividers, dense but scannable dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no dominant blue corporate palette, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no cartoon mascot UI, no logging-company logo, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beaver", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Beaver dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Beaver" / "Beaver Tail". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, constructive operations and field planning mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Beaver, Beaver Tail, Woodland Stream, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Operations Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve warm beaver-fur primary actions, bark-brown structured panels, leathery tail-scale texture, pale wood-chip highlights, stream-blue focus rings and chart highlights, reed-green success states, dam-stick dividers, construction-log workflows, work orders, material inventory, flow metrics, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as beaver and constructive operations, not otter, squirrel, generic black-and-orange gaming UI, logging-company branding, or blue corporate SaaS.
Typography: English operations UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual labels for tasks, materials, water flow, crew schedules, asset maintenance, and construction logs with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, project cards, work-order metrics, material inventory, schedule summary, task table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep wet-fur umber background, dark bark panels, warm beaver-brown active states, stream-blue focus rings and data lines, reed-green success chips, wood-chip tan foreground labels, muted river-stone borders, subtle tail-scale texture overlays, thin dam-stick separators, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards.
Constraints: no neon orange, no pure-black flat background, no dominant purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon mascot UI, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Beaver", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
